name: @radu_api/sentinel-scan
description: EU AI Act technical assurance scanner — 100% offline, sub-3ms via WebAssembly. Heuristic mapping for Articles 5, 10, 13, 14 & 22.

scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator bin/sentinel-scan.js --output dist/index.js --compact true --self-defending false --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 1 --rename-globals true --control-flow-flattening false --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0 --reserved-strings "fs,path,cli-progress,https,../pkg-node/sentinel_core.js,../package.json"
scripts.build:bin: npm run obfuscate && pkg dist/index.js --config package.json --target node18-win-x64 --out-path bin-builds
